untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'short-term trend continuation' and 'normal-sized body' which are subjective qualitative assessments not quantifiable with allowed indicators. Success rates and performance metrics (success_rate_bull, average_rise_pct, etc.) marked AUTHOR_SILENT cannot be translated. The pattern needs regime context (bull vs bear) to determine direction, but allowed regimes do not include BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET as standardized technical indicators.
translation_notes: Translated the measurable components: black candle (close < open, represented by body > 0 with close logic), shadows smaller than body (upper_wick and lower_wick both less than body). Exit conditions use price reversal as proxy for trend continuation break. Cannot quantify 'normal size' body or detect trend continuation without additional context indicators.
